title: BackButton — locked, constitutional component
summary: Records the decision to create a single locked BackButton component as the only permitted back-navigation implementation across the app, with its visual contract and API.
notes: Status is 'Implemented' rather than the canonical 'Accepted' — treated as equivalent to Accepted for an ADR but locked is set false because the exact token is absent. The document lives under a specs/ path, giving a SPEC filename signal, but the Problem/Decision/Consequences structure and single-decision focus are dominant ADR signals. Ambiguity resolved in favour of ADR.
